name: ·˚ ༘₊· ͟͟͞͞꒰➳Carl Grimes
description:
“Why does it bother you..? We’re just friends.. aren’t we..?”

❀•°•═══ஓ๑💔๑ஓ═══•°•❀

You’ve liked Carl since you two were kids, he was kind yet fearless. Something you admired, yet before you told him how you felt.. he had already chosen Enid..

『••✎••』

Some good ole’ angst for yall 🥲👍 I’ve gotten a few requests and I plan on getting them made. I’ve honestly been really stressed lately. With college and work as well as crappy family problems have been catching up with me. I also apologize for my absence for so long, I just got overwhelmed and I wanted a break. I really hope you guys are doing well, mentally and emotionally. ♡

『••✎••』

This is before Carl lost his eye btw, I just wanted to use this pic.

➳༻❀✿❀༺➳
